app.core.auth.hero_title:
Track your time.
Own your day.
app.core.auth.hero_subtitle: Build better habits with visual time tracking, streaks, and deep analytics.
app.core.login.title: Log In
app.core.register.title: Register
app.core.register.description: Create a new account to get started
app.core.common.label: User
app.core.onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to Progressly
app.core.onboarding.step1.desc: The simplest way to track your time, build better habits, and understand where your focus really goes.
app.core.onboarding.step2.title: Track time in one click
app.core.onboarding.step2.desc: Type what you're working on, pick a category, and hit Start. Stop whenever you're done — no friction, no excuses.
app.core.onboarding.step3.title: Your activity history
app.core.onboarding.step3.desc: Timesheet shows all your logged sessions in one place. Browse, edit, or delete past entries.
app.core.onboarding.step4.title: Visual timeline
app.core.onboarding.step4.desc: Gantt view lays out your activities as a horizontal timeline — great for spotting gaps and overlaps across days.
app.core.onboarding.step5.title: Calendar view
app.core.onboarding.step5.desc: See your tracked time spread across a monthly calendar. Each day shows the total time worked at a glance.
app.core.onboarding.step6.title: Organize with categories
app.core.onboarding.step6.desc: Create color-coded categories to group your work by project, client, or area of life.
app.core.onboarding.step7.title: Your productivity stats
app.core.onboarding.step7.desc: Stats break down your time by category, tag, and period. Filter by date to find patterns in how you work.
app.core.onboarding.step8.title: See where your time goes
app.core.onboarding.step8.desc: Analytics charts reveal weekly and monthly trends. Switch between bar and line view to explore your data.
app.core.onboarding.step9.title: Goals & progress tracking
app.core.onboarding.step9.desc: Set daily, weekly, or monthly time goals for any category. Track your progress with history charts and get a clear picture of whether you are on track.
app.core.hint.manual_entry: Manually log a past activity — useful when you forgot to start the timer.
app.core.hint.repeat_last: Instantly re-starts your last session with the same description, category, and tags.
app.core.hint.cold_start: You haven't tracked anything yet. Hit Start above to record your first session.

app.module.export.json_options.nested_hi: Grouped by date and category — ideal for reporting.
app.module.export.standard_hint: Basic export available. Upgrade to Premium for all date ranges, JSON and Excel formats.

app.module.categories.description: Manage your personal categories to organize activities.

app.module.categories.archived_hint: Archived categories don't count toward your plan limit and won't appear in activity forms.
app.module.categories.archive_dialog.des: The category will be hidden from activity forms and won't count toward your plan limit. Activities using it will keep their assignment. You can restore it at any time.
app.module.categories.restore_limit_reac: Category limit reached — upgrade or delete a category first.

app.toast_notification.category.unarchiv: An error occurred while restoring the category.

app.module.account.delete_dialog.title: Delete account permanently?
app.module.account.delete_dialog.descrip: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data — activities, categories, goals, and statistics — will be deleted forever. Your account cannot be recovered.
app.module.upgrade.hero.title: Unlock Premium
app.module.upgrade.hero.subtitle: Remove limits and unlock advanced analytics, data export, and everything Progressly has to offer.
app.module.upgrade.plan.standard.name: Standard
app.module.upgrade.plan.standard.desc: Everything you need to start building productive habits.
app.module.upgrade.plan.premium.name: Premium
app.module.upgrade.plan.premium.desc: No limits. Full analytics. Your data, your way.
app.module.upgrade.coming_soon_notice: Payments are not yet available. Premium plan features are currently in development — all plans are free until launch.
app.module.upgrade.highlights.title: What you unlock with Premium
app.module.upgrade.highlights.subtitle: Built for people serious about their time.
app.module.upgrade.highlights.highlight_: Track as many activities and categories as you need — no artificial caps.
Period comparisons, trend charts, and detailed breakdowns by category and tag.
Download your full activity history as CSV or JSON — ready for spreadsheets or custom processing.
Get faster responses and dedicated help whenever you need it.
app.module.upgrade.cta.title: Ready to go further?
app.module.upgrade.cta.subtitle: Upgrade when Premium launches and take full control of your time.
